case.title: BOHMAN v. BOSTON REAL ESTATE COMMISSION.

opinion.h4: BOHMAN v. BOSTON REAL ESTATE COMMISSION., (1964)
BOHMAN v. CITY OF BOSTON REAL ESTATE COMMISSION. APPEAL FROM THE SUPERIOR COURT OF MASSACHUSETTS. No. 312, Misc. Decided October 19, 1964.
opinion.p: Appeal dismissed for want of a substantial federal question.
The appeal is dismissed for want of a substantial federal question.
opinion.h4: BOHMAN v. PEUTUCKET FIVE CENT SAVING BANK, (1964)
opinion.p: BOHMAN v. PEUTUCKET FIVE CENT SAVING BANK. APPEAL FROM THE SUPREME JUDICIAL COURT OF MASSACHUSETTS. No. 313, Misc. Decided October 19, 1964.
Appeal dismissed for want of a substantial federal question.
The appeal is dismissed for want of a substantial federal question.
